plan_under_test: output-integrity-audit detects foreign top-level question labels in mark_scheme_text without formula false positives.
tests_added_or_changed: Add a current-output-integrity test where q10 mark_scheme_text includes q9 and q7 top-level labels.
Include a q7 long-answer control with q7 labels and 8C3 formula text that must not be flagged.
expected_initial_failure: Before implementation, the audit will not emit mark_scheme_text_foreign_question_label failures.
what_passing_proves: Stale mark-scheme text with neighboring question labels becomes an integrity failure.
Simple formula number substrings do not create false positives.
what_passing_does_not_prove: It does not visually inspect images.
It does not detect every possible semantic contamination pattern.
risk_of_bad_tests: Moderate. Regex checks can overreach, so the test includes a same-question/formula control.
